title: The Palace Panic Spreads
description: On pages 13–16, this part follows Unknown person #1, Narrator, King Neptune, Vander Decken, Fish-Men, Luffy, Shirahoshi. The core story beat is the palace panic spreads.
scene: The scene centers on the palace panic spreads, with Unknown person #1, Narrator, King Neptune, Vander Decken, Fish-Men, Luffy, Shirahoshi driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Should you so desire, I will gladly face you in combat...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This crew have caused all kinds of crazy incidents...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: even without their captain, they're a force to be reckoned with...!!!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: Such a pity... I was looking forward to sampling the palace wine...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Did Nosey used to be as imposing as all that?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do not falter, soldiers!! See this for what it is - a prelude to the terrors to come!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They must be stopped at all costs!! To protect our proud nation!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...Oh, that's rich! We'd never have tried anything here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...If you hadn't attacked us first!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This army is nothing compared to the giant insects of the boin archi- Pelago!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Taste the power of my new weapon: Black Kabuto!!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: Neptunee- Sama!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Lend us your strength!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hmmmmmmm...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I feel unsure whether it is right to impression them for a future crime...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I would like some time to think this over...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: As such...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will capture them for the moment!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Take this!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Such force...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ZORO!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Zoro... I thought you were in the dungeons...!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: I heard the sounds of merry- making...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So I thought I'd come out and play!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You wait there, wada- Tsumi.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: GOTCHA!

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: Captain!! Vander Decken- Sama has arrived!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ahhh! Hhhh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This way!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hmmm Mmmm Mm...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sorry I'm a little late... got caught up in a little volcanic eruption.

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Men
dialogue.text: So... you're the one, right? The infamous Fish-Man known as hordy!! I know it!

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: You're pretty infamous yourself... Mad Captain, Vander Becken!!!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: It'll be a pleasure working with you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, you're after a hand- shake...?! Can't be having that... hang on a second...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's better...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, it's nothing...

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: Decken!! Decken!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Bahohohohoh!!! The pleasure is all mine!! Hordy Jones!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This alliance benefits us both!! Our goal is the same!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: HORDY!! HORDY!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To crush that despicable army, who have none of the pride befitting their races!!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: to take the head of "sea God" Neptunee!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...with this, there's nobody under the whole ocean to oppose us...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This sure is quite the gathering!! Kyakyah!!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: And to bring about the total destruction of the ryuguu kingdom!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ONE PIECE 30 2Y...

summary: The Palace Panic Spreads. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
